subcodes.first_line: O ye who are attracted by the fragrances of God! According to what hath become known, the Spiritual Assembly hath been adorned with those celestial souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذبین بنفحات الله از قرار معلوم محفل روحانی بان نفوس رحمانی آراسته گشته
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @call to action, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @unity; oneness of humanity, @praise and encouragement, @love and unity
